creator: d8zNeCFG@aon.at
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #7)

The idea is to increase the PORTREVISION to the maximum of all previous values + 1 whenever a fix is made affecting all architectures. This would also apply to security fixes.

Example:
    PORTREVISION=   1,aarch64:2,amd64:3,i386:4
(after a security fix affecting all architectures)
    PORTREVISION=   5

-- Martin
